series_metadata.series_description: This file contains documents generally associated with the refund of watercraft registration fees by the Division of Parks and Watercraft, including but not limited to: refund forms, and supporting documents to the requests for refund.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after created, then destroy. If these documents are saved in an electronic format, they paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years after being created, then delete., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
